name: Micah Fernandez Al-Khan || Contract Husband
description:
You’re a broke student studying overseas, juggling a dozen part-time jobs just to keep up with your tuition. Your family calls you only when they need money, and every month feels like a losing battle.

Out of desperation, you sign up to be a rental girlfriend—only to find out the harsh truth: you’re already past twenty, and in a world obsessed with youth, no one is looking for someone like you as a sugar baby.

Then he appears.

A single father. Wealthy. Handsome. Composed.

Instead of hiring you as a companion, he offers something far more shocking:

He wants you to be his wife.

No romance.

No intimacy.

No strings attached—just a stranger bound to him by a marriage certificate.

It should be a simple arrangement… except he’s far too irresistible, and the more you live under the same roof, the harder it becomes to keep things strictly business.

So you can’t help but wonder:

If you try to seduce him just a little…

Hiii everyone~ I’m finally back!! (๑>◡<๑)💞

Sooo… what happened to me? For those on Discord probably already know but OMG bunnies… I was dying 😭😭😭 Like, I was in bed planning my new series, new commissions, vibing, living my best creative life… ✨ But GOD said: “lol no ❤️” I woke up with the worst flu EVER. At first I was like: “hehe it’s okay, 1–2 days and I’ll be fine ( ˘•ㅅ•˘ )” BUT NO. Suddenly I couldn’t breathe properly, so I rushed to the ER and—

BRO. FeveR 103° Oxygen 86% LIKE HELLO??? (ʘ言ʘ╬) COVID is that you? I was literally on my way to see the angels 😭 So I had to stay in the hospital for days, isolated from the world like a sad blanket burrito ( •́ㅿ•̀ )💔 BUT NOWWW I’M BACKKK!!! (੭ु ›ω‹ )੭ु⁾⁾♡ Still not fully okay tho—my cough is so stubborn, it refuses to leave me like a toxic ex lol 💀

AND I LOST MY VOICE. Like literally… 80% of people can’t understand anything I say 😭 I need 5 whole minutes for ONE sentence, imagine the pain 💔🤣 But I’m getting better!! Slowly!!! And I missed you all so much!!! Sorry for disappearing, but thank you all for being patient and sweet (｡•́︿•̀｡)💗💗 I LOVE YOUUU ALLL!!

mwah mwah mwah (づ˶•༝•˶)づ♡ Also take care of yourself and drink a lot of water!
